# SCORE Houston Local Resource for ZIP 77084 and Greater Houston

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, score-houston, local-resource, 77084, greater-houston, mentor

## Resource purpose
Local SCORE chapter page for entrepreneurs in Houston, Katy, and the Greater Houston/Upper Gulf Coast service area. Use this for local mentoring and local workshop routing.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Route Greater Houston users here when they need a local SCORE mentor, local business workshops, local ecosystem orientation, or a warm entry point into SCORE. ZIP 77084 can be treated as a Houston/Katy-area local routing case.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All lifecycle stages, especially Ideation, Validation, Formation, Launch, Growth, and Recovery/Troubleshooting.

## Best audience
Entrepreneurs in Greater Houston, Upper Gulf Coast, Houston, Katy, Sugar Land, Pearland, Baytown, Pasadena, Conroe, Galveston, League City, Lake Jackson, Bryan/College Station, Beaumont, Port Arthur, Victoria, Lake Charles, and nearby communities listed by SCORE Houston.

## Route the user here when
The entrepreneur is in or near Houston/77084 and would benefit from free confidential mentoring, local workshops, accountability, operator judgment, or a local mentor familiar with the Houston-area market.

## Useful intake questions before referral
- What ZIP code or city are you operating from?
- Are you looking for a local mentor, a workshop, or both?
- What lifecycle stage are you in: idea, validation, formation, launch, operating, growth, or exit?
- Do you already have a SCORE mentor?
- What industry, customer segment, and geographic service area are you targeting?

## Source notes captured for BOSS
- SCORE Houston describes itself as serving entrepreneurs in the Greater Houston area, Upper Gulf Coast, and nearby Texas and Louisiana communities.
- The chapter page lists free confidential business mentoring and educational workshops.
- Workshop/event listings are time-sensitive; always refer the user to the live page for current dates and registration details.

## Related SCORE links
- Request or search for a SCORE mentor: https://www.score.org/mentors/
- How SCORE mentoring works: https://www.score.org/how-mentoring-works/
- What to expect from mentoring: https://www.score.org/what-to-expect/
- SCORE workshops and events: https://www.score.org/business-education/
- SCORE national resources: https://www.score.org/resources/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
